title: Person Contacts
description: People who will be contacted in case of emergency or other situations related to the subject person

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the person contacts information resource

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

fullName.title: Full Name
fullName.description: The full name of the contact

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The first name of the contact

middleName.title: Middle Name
middleName.description: The middle name of the contact

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: The last name of the contact

contactAddress.title: Contact Address
contactAddress.description: The associated physical or mailing address of the contact

address.title: Address
address.description: The complete address (optionally, split into multiple lines)

oneOf.title: Full Address
oneOf.description: The complete physical or mailing address

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of address for a person. Includes a standard type (e.g. 'home', 'school') and an optional, custom type to further identify the type of address.

addressType.title: Type
addressType.description: A mapping to a standard type for the address type.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

addressLines.title: Address Lines
addressLines.description: The address lines (e.g., street name and building number, apartment or suite, etc.)

place.title: Place
place.description: A country specific postal region.  Postal regions are expressed as a hierarchy of country, region, and sub-region, and as a locality with postal automation codes

country.title: Country
country.description: The country where the mailing address is located.

code.title: Code
code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

title.title: Country
title.description: The name of the country, as used in everyday speech.

postalTitle.title: Postal Country
postalTitle.description: The name of the country when mail is being addressed from an international sender.

code.description: The ISO 3166-2 code of a region within the country

deliveryPoint.title: Delivery Point
deliveryPoint.description: A specific set of digits between 00 and 99 assigned to every address. When combined with the ZIP + 4 code, the delivery point provides a unique identifier for every deliverable address served by the US Postal Service.

carrierRoute.title: Carrier Route
carrierRoute.description: A subdivision of a US zipcode.

correctionDigit.title: Correction Digit
correctionDigit.description: A number used to check for errors in a US ZIP code, delivery point, or carrier route.

phones.title: Phones
phones.description: The phones at which the contact can be reached

contactAvailability.title: Contact Availability
contactAvailability.description: The avaialbility of (best time to call) the contact on this number

countryCallingCode.title: Country Calling Code
countryCallingCode.description: The country calling code of telephone and/or mobile device when dialing internationally.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the phone.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the phone when multiple phones share the same primary number.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: The relationship between the subject person and the contact

oneOf.title: Relationship Type
oneOf.description: The entered name of the relationship type

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The extension to the type of the relationship

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: The priority number for the contact
